prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white documentary photograph of an elderly man sitting indoors beside a window, shown in a tight side-profile composition from the chest up. He wears a dark wide-brim hat, a heavy dark coat or jacket over a plaid shirt, with long gray hair visible around his ear and deeply wrinkled hands clasped near his mouth in a contemplative pose. The lighting is low-key and moody, with strong shadow on the left side and soft daylight entering from the right through a textured mesh window screen. Include exactly 4 main visible elements: 1 elderly seated man, 1 wide-brim hat, 1 mesh-covered window, and 1 large opaque dark gray rectangular censor block covering the central face and upper torso area. The rectangle should be positioned slightly right of center, spanning much of the man's head and chest, with clean straight edges and no text. Use high contrast monochrome film grain, gritty texture, shallow depth of field, and an intimate quiet atmosphere, as if captured on vintage 35mm film. No captions, no watermark, no color.
